title: WatchlistBuilding
description: A single building beneath a Worst Landlord Watchlist landlord — the building-level record that the ranking aggregates. Proposed schema: the Public Advocate does NOT publish the per-building watchlist rollup as data, though the underlying HPD Housing Maintenance Code Violations data is open citywide on NYC Open Data. Keyed on BBL/BIN and joined to a WorstLandlord.

x-source.underlying_opendata: https://data.cityofnewyork.us (HPD Housing Maintenance Code Violations / Registrations; not published under a PA label)

landlordId.description: The WorstLandlord this building belongs to.

openViolations.description: Open HPD Housing Maintenance Code violations.

registrationExpired.description: Whether the HPD building registration has lapsed.
